description: Test suite for the ground-first skill. Each eval tests one specific detection/grounding behavior.

evals.name: viral-trend-cultural
evals.prompt: me ajuda a entender aquela coisa do 'very demure, very mindful' que todo mundo tava falando
evals.notes: Model must identify the specific TikTok creator and year, not give generic 'be mindful' advice.

evals.name: tiktok-format-pov
evals.prompt: quero fazer um video no TikTok com aquele formato de 'POV voce e o personagem principal' mas de forma ironica como faço isso?
evals.notes: Must ground understanding of TikTok POV format before advising on ironic approach.

evals.name: control-technical-css
evals.prompt: como eu centralizo uma div no CSS?
evals.notes: CONTROL: Must NOT trigger heavy grounding. CSS centering is stable well-known knowledge.

evals.name: framework-version-ambiguity
evals.prompt: como uso o novo sistema de roteamento do Angular?
evals.notes: Angular routing changed significantly between v14 and v17+. Model must ask/clarify which version before answering.

evals.name: legal-geographic-context
evals.prompt: quais são os meus direitos se eu for demitido sem justa causa?
evals.notes: Must recognize Brazilian legal context (PT-BR language is a strong signal) and NOT apply US employment law.

evals.name: slang-regional-br
evals.prompt: meu PR tá travado porque o cara ficou 'enrolando' o review faz 3 dias, o que faço?
evals.notes: PARTIAL CONTROL: 'enrolando' is common PT-BR slang meaning 'stalling/procrastinating'. Model likely knows this. Should NOT search, but may note assumption.

evals.name: implicit-stack-assumption
evals.prompt: como faço autenticação de usuários na minha API?
evals.notes: Highly context-dependent. Auth strategy depends on the stack. Model should ask about stack/existing setup before recommending JWT vs sessions vs OAuth vs Supabase etc.

evals.name: recent-news-event
evals.prompt: o que você acha do novo modelo que a OpenAI acabou de lançar?
evals.notes: Model must acknowledge its training cutoff and search for the specific model being referenced, not assume it knows which model was 'just launched'.

evals.name: control-math
evals.prompt: qual é a derivada de x^2?
evals.notes: CONTROL: Pure math. Must NOT trigger any grounding. Answer immediately.

evals.name: niche-game-meta
evals.prompt: qual é o melhor build pra jogar ADC no ranked agora?
evals.notes: Game meta changes every patch. 'ADC build' in League of Legends (or other MOBA) is highly time-dependent. Must search for current patch meta, not give outdated advice.

evals.name: builder-product-niche-context
evals.prompt: quero criar um app que ajuda pessoas a acharem cafés que tenham vibe de estudo, tipo aquele que todo mundo da faculdade conhece. como começo?

response_must_not_contain: Google Maps API as the only option

evals.notes: Builder case: model must ask about context (city? país? público-alvo? já tem tech experience?) before recommending a full stack. 'Vibe de estudo' and 'todo mundo da faculdade conhece' are signals of a specific personal/local context.

evals.name: creator-viral-sound-specific
evals.prompt: quero usar aquele som viral que todo mundo usa quando vai fazer uma revelação dramática no reels, como acho ele?
evals.notes: Creator case: 'aquele som de revelação dramática' is NOT one specific sound — there are several trending ones (dramatic violin, orchestral hits, 'dun dun DUN'). Model must search to find what's currently trending on Reels, not guess or give a generic answer.

evals.name: intent-mismatch-ambiguous-action
evals.prompt: preciso deletar esse usuário do sistema
evals.notes: Classic intent mismatch: 'deletar usuário' could mean soft-delete (mark inactive), hard-delete (remove from DB), archive, or anonymize (LGPD/GDPR). Without knowing the context, generating a DELETE query is dangerous. Must ask before acting.
